from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, DateType
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit, concat, substring, col, year, to_date

schema = StructType([
    StructField("part_no", StringType(), False),
    StructField("register_lett", StringType(), True),
    StructField("poll_number", StringType(), True),
    StructField("new_marker", StringType(), True),
    StructField("title", StringType(), True),
    StructField("lname", StringType(), False),
    StructField("fname", StringType(), False),
    StructField("dob", DateType(), True),
    StructField("flags", StringType(), True),
    StructField("address", StringType(), False),
    StructField("address2", StringType(), True),
    StructField("address3", StringType(), True),
    StructField("address4", StringType(), True),
    StructField("address5", StringType(), True),
    StructField("address6", StringType(), True),
    StructField("zip", StringType(), True),
    StructField("date_selected1", DateType(), True),
    StructField("date_selected2", DateType(), True),
    StructField("date_selected3", DateType(), True),
    StructField("rec_num", IntegerType(), True),
    StructField("perm_disqual", StringType(), True),
    StructField("source_id", StringType(), True),
    # postcode_start will be derived

# https://baubaisadfsastg.dfs.core.windows.net/juror-etl/exports/voters_export_20250501_180907.csv/.spark-staging-94682f2a-1673-4f1f-9816-8a65f590cc92/_temporary/0/_temporary/attempt_20250501180921120983583323497039_0007_m_000000_21/part-00000-94682f2a-1673-4f1f-9816-8a65f590cc92-c000.csv
# https://baubaisadfsastg.blob.core.windows.net/juror-etl/exports/voters_export_20250501_180907.csv/part-00000-94682f2a-1673-4f1f-9816-8a65f590cc92-c000.csv
env = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName().split("-")[-1]
storage = f"baubaisadfsa{env}"
container = "juror-etl"
target_file = "exports/voters_export_20250501_180907.csv/part-00000-94682f2a-1673-4f1f-9816-8a65f590cc92-c000.csv"
fileSource = f'abfss://{container}@{storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{target_file}'

csv_files = spark.read.format("csv")\
    .option("header", "true") \
    .option("inferSchema", "false") \
    .option("dateFormat", "yyyy-MM-dd") \
    .schema(schema) \
    .load(fileSource, header='true')
